title: ADR-0029: MCP identity edge-verifier cutover (ruling 8 revocation, no bridge)
verdict_summary: Draft ADR / decision record for ENG-1405 (AC1-AC8) — it records rulings (verifier repoint, legacy removal, tenant:subject session rebind, caller-token pass-through, deny-by-default scope gate, Kafka revocation consumer) rather than introducing new formal requirements. Every build obligation it captures derives from already-covered FR-M*/FR-I*/FR-C13 ids and is carried by concrete orvex-studio-mcp stories: 'TS verifier binding: multi-issuer JWKS -> deny-by-default scope gate -> principal', 'Token pass-through: caller token verbatim on every upstream, no service credential', 'Stateless shim: no DB... jti window retires at R1', 'Raw in-process Kafka revocation consumer -> deny-list apply (ADR-0013)', and 'Six studio_* product tools with caller-token pass-through + fail-closed scope gate'. FR-M1..M19, FR-I1..I20, FR-C13, FR-L1..L30 are all present in covers-union. No uncovered BUILD obligation. Zero gaps.

components.name: IdentityJwtVerifier (src/auth/identity-verifier.ts)
components.quote: JwtVerifier's Studio-JWKS + resolve flow is replaced at the edge by IdentityJwtVerifier (src/auth/identity-verifier.ts, already built and unit-tested this program)

components.name: requireScope() deny-by-default scope gate
components.quote: requireScope() (src/auth/identity-verifier.ts, built) is a pure function; it must be invoked BEFORE every upstream call site

components.name: revocation-consumer.ts (in-process Kafka revocation consumer)
components.quote: wiring the driver into revocation-consumer.ts remains blocked on that shipment

components.name: DocmostWrapper / StudioWrapper (egress token pass-through)
components.quote: the MCP's DocmostWrapper/StudioWrapper must forward the caller's own identity-minted bearer token to wiki-api/ai byte-for-byte

components.name: transport/http.ts + transport/stdio.ts (session-identity rebind sid -> tenant:subject)
components.quote: transport/stdio.ts's single-principal claims.sid reference repoints to principal.subject

components.name: identity/principal.schema.json (frozen Principal)
components.quote: the IdP-agnostic org-scoped Principal {idp, subject, tenant, org_or_realm, roles, token_scope} (pinned, identity/principal.schema.json, FROZEN ENG-1537)
